    addClientHandler(ServerEndpoint) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.server.Server

    Adds a player to the table representation.

    Adds players to the table.
    appendMessageToChat(String, boolean) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.game.Table
    Appends a message to the game chat log.
    AVATAR_COUNT - Static variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.game.GameParameters
    The number of avatars available for players.

    ComboBox for selecting an avatar, shown with images.

    Returns the value of the avatarIndex record component.
    avatars - Static variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.ClientMain
